steps.title: Check the parabola
steps.content: The equation $y=x^2+1.7$ is an upward-opening parabola with vertex $(0,1.7)$. That eliminates graphs whose parabola has vertex $(-1.7,0)$.

steps.title: Check the line
steps.content:
The line $y=1.7-x$ has slope $-1$, so it slants downward from left to right. It also passes through $(0,1.7)$ and $(-1,2.7)$. The graph with both features is the matching graph.
The answer is A.
